Fact: Muk shares similar traits to Weezing and Garbodor. All three Pokémon are pure Poison-type Pokémon with a single pre-evolved form, roughly the same base stat totals and Evolution levels, and appear to be based on a different kind of pollution, Muk being water pollution.
Muk is tied with Mew for the shortest English name of all Pokémon.
Alolan Muk and its pre-evolved form, Alolan Grimer, are the only Dark-type Pokémon consisting of a head and arms.
